ogTitle: St Kilda vs St Kilda East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Kilda and St Kilda East.
heading: St Kilda vs St Kilda East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Kilda, Victoria and St Kilda East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Kilda East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to St Kilda (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Kilda or St Kilda East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Kilda has a flood risk score of 29/100, while St Kilda East scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Kilda scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. St Kilda East scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Kilda or St Kilda East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Kilda East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
